flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wake Forest University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.8k → $67.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wake Forest University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.8k → $67.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Wake Forest University rose 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.5k → $21.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wake Forest University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).
